title: Corellia Room
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Corellia Room''' was a [[Casino/Legends|sabacc lounge]] onboard the luxury liner ''[[Star of Empire]]''.

A typical "world-class" public room, it was themed to resemble an actual casino on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and featured all appropriate decorations, complete with [[Vid screen/Legends|vid screen]] "windows" showing Corellia from orbit, and Corellian artwork to emulate that culture's look and feel. It was equipped with a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] table and [[Automated sabacc dealer droids|game droids]].

[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Dol Donar III]] had arranged a game of sabacc at [[Standard hour/Legends|two]], and Donar's [[Nathan Donar III|son, Nathan]], also attended. They attracted the attention of about thirty onlookers around them.

[[Kyle Katarn]] entered the room to visit Nathan, and exchanged looks with a [[Jan Ors|Rebel woman]] he met earlier; the woman ran away and Kyle, seeking revenge and also questions, immediately left running after her. During the process of the game, Donar lost part of his fortune to Calrissian.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''
